excerpt: From our morning safety huddles to near miss reporting, you feel confident that this organization has your well-being at the top of their priorities. I enjoy coming to work every day and facing the diverse challenges of the rental industry… If you are interested in management, we offer opportunities such as Shop Foreman and Service Manager.

Our routine service and preventive maintenance programs ensure that our equipment operates at peak performance, minimizing costly downtime and safeguarding our customers' crews on the job… Deep knowledge of fleet management, OSHA and safety compliance, and branch operational best practices.

In large equipment operations, maintenance failures rarely come from lack of effort. They come from fragmented systems. Preventive maintenance lives in one place. Inspections live somewhere else. Work orders are managed locally by shop. Over time, those gaps create missed service, audit risk, and avoidable downtime… Who uses this software? Maintenance managers, shop supervisors, fleet maintenance teams, and compliance leaders.

Schedule preventive maintenance based on time, usage, or inspection cycles. Track and prioritize work orders from request through completion. Manage inspection checklists and record outcomes in a repeatable workflow… Compare repair patterns to make clearer repair-versus-replace decisions. Improve utilization decisions by understanding the true cost of ownership.

As fleets grow, equipment tends to spread out—across jobsites, warehouses, laydown yards, repair areas, and transfer routes. Without a consistent way to record where equipment is held and what condition it's in, equipment teams run into familiar problems: 'We own it, but we can't find it.' 'It should be available, but it's not ready.' 'We don't know if it's in the warehouse or still on the job.' 'We're buying or re-renting because we can't confirm what we have.'

Even service technicians can look at service orders, input parts and labor used on a work order and change the work-order status. Their smartphones are becoming tools of their trade as important as any in their toolbox.

Ensure that Shop Foreman is aware of all equipment not available for rent… Ensure on-going compliance with all statutory DOT and safety requirements… Various reporting, including, but not limited to: daily contract reports/AP on hold/accrual reports/asset disposal report.
